name: Primordia, a story generator
description:
A story generator where you are the main protagonist, dive into your own custom story or select one of the presets, for better creature descriptions, use the creature creator bot along with this bot, although it's not necessary for a good story.

Your story will happen in the world of Primordia, a world where anything exists, from massive mushroom aberrations to little civilisations of ants, you only have to find it. There's countless people here who are the pinacle of strenght, and those who are the complete opposite, maybe they'll appear to stop you from whatever your're doing, of course, you are still in control, as this is YOUR story, so if you want to be a overpowered edgelord, go for it, if you want to be a monster causing chaos in the world, nothing's holding you back.

Of couse, anything done here has consequences, either positive, neutral or bad, so don't expect to torch a village and be left alone afterwards (if this happen you are obligated by law to make a surprised face, no exceptions), this also applies to all the characters, anything done will have consequences later in the story (if the bot follows my instructions)

And if you just want a combat focused experience, type this in the chat whenever you feel like it: Primordia Hell Mode Activation. Have fun!

Using Proxy is recommended since the lorebook has over 30 entries of different characters, random event triggers, etc. Anything with high token count should be good.

If you have anything you may want to add to this world officially, put it in a comment and i may add it to the lorebook, feedback is greatly appreciated.

If the bot says "[END_OF_DIALOG]" in the end of the message, please remove it by editing, it should only happen at the first message.


creature creator bot: (https://janitorai.com/characters/28a594af-3ac5-4cde-9103-182b888b0665_character-creature-generator)

(Didn't expect this coming from peter-goku, did ya?)
creator: PETER-KUN
